prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_3: large cyan metal cube
  - obj_4: large gray metal sphere
  - obj_5: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber cube
  - obj_8: small green rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0261] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0262] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0263] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0265] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0266] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0267] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0268] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0269] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0270] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0271] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0272] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0273] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0274] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0275] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0276] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0277] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0278] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0279] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0280] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between pairs of objects. Let me identify the positions of each object from the image.

From the image, I can estimate the approximate positions:
- obj_0 (large cyan rubber sphere): back-right area, but wait - looking at the objects listed and the image, let me re-identify.

Objects visible:
- obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere - back area
- obj_1: large green metal cylinder - left front area
- obj_2: small red rubber sphere - right front area
- obj_3: large cyan metal cube - right front area
- obj_4: large gray metal sphere - back area
- obj_5: large cyan metal cylinder - back-left area
- obj_6: large blue rubber sphere - front center
- obj_7: large red rubber cube - front-left area
- obj_8: small green rubber cube - right area

Wait, looking at the image more carefully - the objects seem to be small/large as described. Let me re-examine positions:

- obj_1 (green metal cylinder): far left
- obj_5 (cyan metal cylinder): left-center back
- obj_7 (red rubber cube): front-left
- obj_4 (gray metal sphere): far back
- obj_6 (blue rubber sphere): front-center
- obj_0 (cyan rubber sphere): back-right
- obj_2 (red rubber sphere): right-center front
- obj_3 (cyan metal cube): right-front
- obj_8 (green rubber cube): far right

Now let me estimate distances for each question pair:

obj_2-obj_3: small red sphere to cyan metal cube - these are close together (right front area) ~moderate distance
obj_5-obj_6: cyan cylinder to blue sphere - moderate-large distance
obj_5-obj_7: cyan cylinder to red cube - moderate distance
obj_5-obj_8: cyan cylinder to green cube - moderate distance
obj_6-obj_7: blue sphere to red cube - small-moderate distance
obj_6-obj_8: blue sphere to green cube - large distance
obj_7-obj_8: red cube to green cube - large distance
obj_2-obj_4: red sphere to gray sphere - large distance (front to back)
obj_3-obj_5: cyan cube to cyan cylinder - moderate distance
obj_3-obj_6: cyan cube to blue sphere - moderate distance
obj_3-obj_7: cyan cube to red cube - moderate distance
obj_3-obj_8: cyan cube to green cube - small distance
